message:
Command `# The remaining 48 are .log files and COMMANDS files (shell history) - not active config files
# Logs don't affect execution. COMMANDS files might need patching.
# Patch the COMMANDS files too
find /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v3 -name "COMMANDS" | \
    xargs sed -i \
        -e 's|8afc8346a57fe1ab7934ba5a6056ea8b43078e71|0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af|g' \
        -e 's|NC_XIP/v1\.6\.0|NC_XIP/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_AMBA/v1\.1\.0|NC_AMBA/v1.2.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_COMMON/v1\.6\.0|NC_COMMON/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_GPIO/v1\.6\.0|NC_GPIO/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_UART/v1\.6\.0|NC_UART/v1.7.1|g' \
        -e 's|NC_SPI/v1\.6\.0|NC_SPI/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_I2C/v1\.6\.0|NC_I2C/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_TMR/v1\.6\.0|NC_TMR/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_PWM/v2\.6\.0|NC_PWM/v2.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_DMAC/v1\.6\.0|NC_DMAC/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_CRC/v1\.6\.0|NC_CRC/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_AES/v1\.6\.0|NC_AES/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_WWDT/v1\.6\.0|NC_WWDT/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_RTC/v1\.6\.0|NC_RTC/v1.7.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_SYSTICK/v1\.0\.0|NC_SYSTICK/v1.1.0|g' \
        -e 's|NC_RV32/v1\.1\.0|NC_RV32/v1.1.1|g' \
    2>/dev/null

echo "COMMANDS files patched"

# Now let's try the validation again
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper

librelane \
    --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
    --pdk sky130A \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v3 \
    --only Yosys.JsonHeader \
    config.json 2>&1 | tail -10` executed with exit code 0.
